Document:
# Core Rule 5 - Do not share current round info beyond the game [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2026-02-27[/italic][/color]
This is a zero-tolerance rule. You must wait until the round ends with the in-game round end summary and Wizard's Den Discord round end announcement to share round info.
## Live streams and voice calls Hosts must report attendees who connect to the same current round. Hosts must also kick such players from the stream when possible. [color=SlateGray](Hosts should use a stream delay to reduce current round info leaks and stream sniping.)[/color]
Attendees must not join the same current round as the host. Former attendees must wait until the round ends to join the host in-game.
